title: Metals gains as trade tensions ease
section_path: Metals gains as trade tensions ease
section_path_text: Metals gains as trade tensions ease
summary:
Main
Easing trade tension helped push commodity markets higher. This was aided by the lingering pact of strong economic data from China. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-01-21 142442.png | assets/2025-01-21_metals-gains-as-trade-tensions-ease_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_c680277063fb.png

Market Commentary
Copper led the base metals higher amid easing trade tensions.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Easing trade tension helped push commodity markets higher. This was aided by the lingering pact of strong economic data from China.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Copper led the base metals higher amid easing trade tensions. A Wall Street Journal report said Trump will refrain from implementing aggressive tariffs immediately.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: US President Donald Trump may struggle to achieve his goal is boosting US oil output. Scott Bessent, his US Secretary Treasury nominee, has targeted an additional 3mb/d as part of his economic rescue package.
